name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: ICYMI: SOROS-BACKED SOCIALIST GROUP CAMPAIGNS FOR RAPHAEL WARNOCK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, NOVEMBER 23, 2020 ICYMI: SOROS-BACKED SOCIALIST GROUP CAMPAIGNS FOR RAPHAEL WARNOCK
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, a far-left group bankrolled by George Soros is [endorsing and campaigning](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LKl2oBl7zpfRI6-XREnqxnGPNOl6kTflmjiJnuTyt9DgpW1NqLVNZAPUqiZU3S2MxnPUOOs1epgmtDWhYF0FpgK6Lik4yyi6Jbw0y_uJdoFVXm-kwJi-3e-F5A9Tok_25uQsObljCIMIiTX1cpLLo7ofhNp7p6TByeU73nutO54sTHqnehOkSySCh6BMxFeOrv48VjhQ-_b4DEV9khqrxXxnJzbAYd3l0-DveB2PpjQ7cfJ4UyPdnbJf3z-bI96XSdaBCwQYqv9TCl9NhZ_blCIihDy-LzCT4eU6RM04czDW6aSB-UM8FvGucD3H4ovKV63tLMplMNk=&c=u6SwXLWuQ047AXDyh0D6cbeO8KvhoBQPQF_1yUmHfKkhI21ceEU1Cw==&ch=5qSsjjPbs47n5p8GkjilSgmJoxSFdZS3KAxTv8zKfeuCubgT3kUn9A==) for Raphael Warnock. This group, the Working Families Party, is one of the strongest proponents of [defunding](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LKl2oBl7zpfRI6-XREnqxnGPNOl6kTflmjiJnuTyt9DgpW1NqLVNZLHT7VfL54uFcpIGR_pXw6NlgI81EWSTyxldfaWTtK4fYizhvYtKquJ-3wVbMTo95OF4yPY0XaPMrnVYfAzKLPlExUPMGGoHdTOWzM6cvyY3zFLu5VhdpSc=&c=u6SwXLWuQ047AXDyh0D6cbeO8KvhoBQPQF_1yUmHfKkhI21ceEU1Cw==&ch=5qSsjjPbs47n5p8GkjilSgmJoxSFdZS3KAxTv8zKfeuCubgT3kUn9A==) the police, and its radical platform is endorsed by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib and other liberal extremists.
As the Washington Examiner [reports](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LKl2oBl7zpfRI6-XREnqxnGPNOl6kTflmjiJnuTyt9DgpW1NqLVNZAPUqiZU3S2MxnPUOOs1epgmtDWhYF0FpgK6Lik4yyi6Jbw0y_uJdoFVXm-kwJi-3e-F5A9Tok_25uQsObljCIMIiTX1cpLLo7ofhNp7p6TByeU73nutO54sTHqnehOkSySCh6BMxFeOrv48VjhQ-_b4DEV9khqrxXxnJzbAYd3l0-DveB2PpjQ7cfJ4UyPdnbJf3z-bI96XSdaBCwQYqv9TCl9NhZ_blCIihDy-LzCT4eU6RM04czDW6aSB-UM8FvGucD3H4ovKV63tLMplMNk=&c=u6SwXLWuQ047AXDyh0D6cbeO8KvhoBQPQF_1yUmHfKkhI21ceEU1Cw==&ch=5qSsjjPbs47n5p8GkjilSgmJoxSFdZS3KAxTv8zKfeuCubgT3kUn9A==):
"A far-left activist group that strongly supports defunding the police is holding phone bank events for Georgia Senate candidate Rev. Raphael Warnock ... 'The only way to stop police violence is to defund the police ...' the organization tweeted in August.
'We need to reimagine policing and reimagine the relationships between law enforcement and communities,' Warnock said on the campaign trail over the summer."
"Raphael Warnock has a history of attacking our police officers, calling them gangsters, thugs, bullies, and a threat to our children, so it's disgusting -- but not surprising -- that he now wants to defund them and make every Georgia family, community, and neighborhood less safe," said Communications Director Stephen Lawson.
As the handpicked candidate of the Socialist Left, Raphael Warnock would vote in lockstep with Soros-backed national Democrats to defund the police, empty the jails and impose socialized medicine and the Green New Deal.
Click [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LKl2oBl7zpfRI6-XREnqxnGPNOl6kTflmjiJnuTyt9DgpW1NqLVNZBodfyr_I99ASl2bLh0KdL5ObsDDiijE9OymGbpQ0egWQpAyGwOutKV_muKNYYxQ1QvFfWOUDQ_J6FAlLNlt3DUXWUzkpVeLVQ==&c=u6SwXLWuQ047AXDyh0D6cbeO8KvhoBQPQF_1yUmHfKkhI21ceEU1Cw==&ch=5qSsjjPbs47n5p8GkjilSgmJoxSFdZS3KAxTv8zKfeuCubgT3kUn9A==) to learn more about Radical Raphael's nightmare for Georgia.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Keep fighting! Week of November 23rd Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
NO FACEBOOK LIVE OR WASHINGTON REPORT TODAY | |
---
As we gather with family and friends this week, I am thankful for you, and along with the Tea Party Patriots Action staff, I hope you have a good Thanksgiving week.

Keep an eye out for ways to hold your ground and keep fighting. President Trump has taken so many arrows for us over the last four years, and now it’s our turn to stand up for him. Don’t give up!

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
PRAY FOR OUR NATION & HAVE A HAPPY THANKSGIVING
This week, please take time to pray for our country, President Trump and his legal team, and the future. And, take time to enjoy Thanksgiving with your family – don’t let petty tyrants steal this from you! Be sure to rest and enjoy the blessings in your life.
|
---
VOLUNTEER TO HELP WITH THE GEORGIA SENATE RUNOFFS
No matter what happens with the Presidential election results, the Senate majority – and our nation’s fate – hangs in the balance – both Senate seats in Georgia are going to a runoff, and some people have said that Democrats and their allies may spend $1 billion on those races!

If President Trump is able to stop the steal, but we lose the Senate, the House will most assuredly impeach again, and this time, a Democrat Senate would convict. If the corruption is insurmountable, and Joe Biden is sworn in, and we lose the Senate, the Democrats’ ability to completely transform the United States of America. They will remove the legislative filibuster, they will pack the courts, they will give statehood to Puerto Rico and Washington, D.C., in order to add 4 new Democrat Senators and forever change the balance of the Senate.

This is why we need you to sign up to help Get Out The Vote for the Senate seats in Georgia. Add in the fact that Georgia is one of the hot spots of election fraud and we will need every legal vote for Sen. Perdue and Sen. Loeffler we can get. Sign up below to help, and we will be in touch soon with details, and get your friends to sign up too!
[SECURE THE SENATE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzI4LThlYTI2YTJjNDMyYzRhNTY4YTJiYmE0ZjQwMWZkMjAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZngwNlZIVGJFRkZBTE41TGVsUHc1SFBiSnZqdS1QN19kZ3BOTTNHeUdLOTU4eWJRL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MzAxOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=neXHPY_z1WkR4Hcr3Gkm5g)

---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of November 23rd

**This week, we are learning about, and discussing, the Thanksgiving holiday, and why it is important to our nation’s history and founding.**

There are many people who want to erase our history, or twist it into something it is not. Thanksgiving is not immune to this effort, and one way the left tries to change history around Thanksgiving is to change its meaning – separating it from our founding and turning it into something unrecognizable, or twist it into something ugly. Don’t let this happen.

Read this article aloud to your kids or grandkids, from Hillsdale College’s Imprimus, titled, “[Thanksgiving and America](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzI4LThlYTI2YTJjNDMyYzRhNTY4YTJiYmE0ZjQwMWZkMjAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9pbXByaW1pcy5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoYW5rc2dpdmluZy1hbmQtYW1lcmljYS8_bWlkPTQzMDE4JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=CCt3IyOqTSlFXDCrV8u7Yg).” It’s quite long, but very good. You could break it into sections and read it over the course of the day, or all at one time at the dinner table.

Read George Washington’s [Thanksgiving Proclamation](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzI4LThlYTI2YTJjNDMyYzRhNTY4YTJiYmE0ZjQwMWZkMjAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW50ZWxsZWN0dWFsdGFrZW91dC5vcmcvYXJ0aWNsZS9nZW9yZ2Utd2FzaGluZ3RvbnMtdGhhbmtzZ2l2aW5nLXByb2NsYW1hdGlvbi13aGF0LWRpZmZlcmVudC1lcmEvP21pZD00MzAxOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=-n5OV7zEqBfF2y5emRTcPw) aloud as well. What a beautiful piece of our history to share with the younger generations of Americans! Many will never read or hear this in school, and it’s up to us to share it with them.

Read Abraham Lincoln’s [Proclamation of Thanksgiving](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzI4LThlYTI2YTJjNDMyYzRhNTY4YTJiYmE0ZjQwMWZkMjAz%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cDovL3d3dy5hYnJhaGFtbGluY29sbm9ubGluZS5vcmcvbGluY29sbi9zcGVlY2hlcy90aGFua3MuaHRtP21pZD00MzAxOCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=ABuUqKfjCWEGsuPGwMNDVg) aloud as well. Again, a piece of our history that may be lost if we don’t share it.

Spend time with your family and pass this truly American tradition on to our youth!
|
---
Thank you!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth

subject: Our report card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Indiana Republicans won BIG on election night, but our work isn’t over! >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470022?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-scorecard-112020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_scorecard_112020&mc_cid=ce046d90b2&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t

Hoosier Republican,

President Trump is still standing and fighting to have every legally-cast vote counted. But here in Indiana – through our state’s secure elections – Hoosiers went to the polls and overwhelmingly selected Republicans to continue providing great government service!

* Indiana was once again first on the board for President Trump and Vice President Pence.
* Governor Holcomb won with the most ballots ever cast for governor – and nearly set a record for the highest margin of victory.
* Todd Rokita won a decisive victory and is now our Attorney General-Elect.
* Victoria Spartz won a nationally-targeted race in the 5th Congressional District and is now headed to Congress.
* AND we expanded our supermajority in the Indiana House and maintained our supermajority in the Indiana Senate

https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-scorecard-112020?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=pg_e_scorecard_112020&mc_cid=ce046d90b2&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Republicans were victorious in Indiana only because of YOUR support, Hoosier Republican. I’m so grateful for every patriot who made a stand and I’m asking you to keep this success going.

This is only the beginning of our fight and if we want to keep winning, as Indiana’s one and only Party of Purpose, we need the resources to continue supporting Republican candidates across Indiana. Will you please dig deep and help our party one more time?
RUSH $5 NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-scorecard-112020?utm_campaign=ingop&utm_content=pg_e_scorecard_112020&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=email_PG&amount=5&mc_cid=ce046d90b2&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
RUSH $10 NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-scorecard-112020?utm_campaign=ingop&utm_content=pg_e_scorecard_112020&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=email_PG&amount=10&mc_cid=ce046d90b2&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

RUSH $50 NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-scorecard-112020?utm_campaign=ingop&utm_content=pg_e_scorecard_112020&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=email_PG&amount=50&mc_cid=ce046d90b2&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-e-scorecard-112020?utm_campaign=ingop&utm_content=pg_e_scorecard_112020&utm_medium=Email&utm_source=email_PG&mc_cid=ce046d90b2&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

We have to keep going. If you see what’s happening in other states, you know why it’s critical that we keep fighting. Please make a stand for patriotism and send your best gift now. Every dollar is appreciated and goes toward the fight against the liberal machine!

Thanks for helping out,
Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana GOP

clean_body: The Georgia Senate runoffs are going to come down to the wire--and wealthy liberals from Hollywood are already flooding Georgia with negative television ads. Friend, am only sharing this information with my most loyal supporters, so please do not forward this to anyone. The Georgia Senate runoffs are going to come down to the wire--and wealthy liberals from Hollywood are already flooding Georgia with negative television ads. These liberal megadonors know that if they can win in Georgia, there will be no stopping the Schumer and Pelosi radical agenda. I can tell you first-hand that when these liberal donors target a Republican for defeat--they can raise millions of dollars in a matter of minutes. Yes, minutes. The Democrat running against Lindsey Graham in my home state of South Carolina was able to raise hundreds of millions of dollars from wealthy liberals. In one quarter alone, he raised $57 million! Friend, these same donors are now pouring money into Georgia. Here is the good news, despite the flood of liberal cash into South Carolina, Lindsey Graham fought back and WON. However, with Senate Control hanging in the balance, the amount of liberal money pouring into Georgia will surely break records. We cannot sit back and allow these liberal megadonors to win in Georgia and take over the Senate Majority. While we're excited about Maine, Montana, and Iowa, our battle for the Senate isn't over, yet. Control of the Senate is still hanging in the balance, and it all comes down to GEORGIA. Friend, Democrats collectively thought the odds were overwhelmingly in their favor to flip the Senate blue, but in some races, predicted margins were off by double-digits! While we're excited about Maine, Montana, and Iowa, our battle for the Senate isn't over, yet. Control of the Senate is still hanging in the balance, and it all comes down to GEORGIA. name: Marco Rubio
subject: Scared for a good reason
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Friend,
Hundreds of thousands of brave Cubans fled their homeland when Fidel Castro came into power. The communist regime was imposing its will across the land, causing death and disorder.
**Many fled to the United States in hopes of finding security under a government that was "For the People, by the People."**
They left their country and their possessions behind and came to the United States to start over, many by themselves. They risked it all to pursue the American Dream.
Margarita De Castro said that it was her experience in Cuba that drove her to become a Republican, proudly voting in every election since becoming a citizen. She is concerned about what she sees in the radical left.
She has every right to be scared.
**The Democratic Party 's agenda progressively looks more and more like the agenda that has destroyed so many countries around the world.**
Friend, if we do not put a stop to their socialist-laced schemes, we may very well become another country destroyed by their own government. Is that the future you want for America?
[We're fighting _AGAINST_ big government and _FOR_ our constitutional rights. Friend,

Today, Hoosier legislators are returning to the Indiana Statehouse to prepare for the 2021 legislative session and to continue the hard work of building One Indiana for All.

This year, Organization Day marks the start of a brand new future for Indiana.

**We’re coming off of a historical election — more people voted for Governor Holcomb than any other governor in the history of our state — and Hoosiers spoke loud and clear that they want to keep building One Indiana.**

Friend, we have an incredible opportunity to make sure that our state continues to set economic records, build world-class infrastructure, lower infant mortality rates, and much, much more.

But we can’t do this alone — we need buy-in from Hoosiers like you, and we want to hear what you have to say about the issues facing Indiana. That’s why we’re reaching out right now.

clean_body: As we work to keep building One Indiana, we’re trying to get as many Hoosiers as possible to fill out our priorities survey, and we noticed that... Hey - did you see our email? As we work to keep building One Indiana, we’re trying to get as many Hoosiers as possible to fill out our priorities survey, and we noticed that you haven’t completed yours yet! Take our 2021 Hoosier Priorities survey here: Best, Holcomb Crew \- - - Forwarded Message Below - - - From: Holcomb Crew Subject: re: what comes next for Indiana To: | | | | ---|---|--- | Friend, Today, Hoosier legislators are returning to the Indiana Statehouse to prepare for the 2021 legislative session and to continue the hard work of building One Indiana for All. This year, Organization Day marks the start of a brand new future for Indiana. We’re coming off of a historical election — more people voted for Governor Holcomb than any other governor in the history of our state — and Hoosiers spoke loud and clear that they want to keep building One Indiana. Friend, we have an incredible opportunity to make sure that our state continues to set economic records, build world-class infrastructure, lower infant mortality rates, and much, much more. But we can’t do this alone — we need buy-in from Hoosiers like you, and we want to hear what you have to say about the issues facing Indiana. That’s why we’re reaching out right now. Thank you for your response — we count on your feedback. Best, Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

From: Team Oberweis

Date:
Thursday, November 19th, 2020

Subject Line: We thought Halloween was
over

Peter,

Halloween must have been extended, because we
have just received data back for a whole host of scary things, from
dead people voting to several thousand people who moved from their
Registered voter address but voted anyway.

This is bananas, and we
can’t let this stand.

Our team is working hard on our discovery
recount, but we need funding to make it happen. Will you chip in $10
for an hour or more of staff funding on our effort to make sure EVERY
legal vote is counted?

2. Schumer and the entire Left is FLOODING Georgia with cash
3. Kelly wins, Republicans in the majority. Kelly loses, Democrats in the majority

Kelly is our FINAL DEFENSE against the Left and their radical agenda. The Senate majority comes down to the race in Georgia. **Conservatives NEED Kelly Loeffler in the Senate in January. Help her FIGHT BACK against the Left 's giant warchest TODAY.**
[**CHIP IN NOW >>>**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001imd9HQ7eQfU2hqfSWGMZSZta0-6rLgK-54RpDa6KxSuRpEV6sfK2XyDemflAf23zWMgWtekZ6VaM1wnmn5WvgANvFtmnyRh9pFLb9KS_pTUWNVWb1rhN2hdazX9aLQZsCoKf20ol6IwtiqakHCvplIWLS0P5PQCmNhkvCpCrGwL-4pAYImfp5hNUGzcF555acV2Dul35JTm4gjnlge9-LeKQWgSbcwbw14ijEz0NvtnhSVRcaoTlfS8dFCjfQk1ptuOZSOFnX8jheMYUXkJt3J1ka7dlsn5-bSidyRQvToJJKl1CsXUScm99WFJCJdfCac0c6Rzf77RaUejyJnk_SrR3i8HjSzqIs8sDTvotsbOq0R8nKEjhLSGKqhC3x1lKXtyl7Wmb2SJnT3-40l2CqGirwsGHQ83eqme80M6dZ-uCoVczcq8h__ZYktOAcfo0p8Sitp4u1lm43XWYu23Xaw==&c=bPCPLPhWcl7jyPb77zFVkOEKr-hYhphXjRE6wAWusMP0xhqlECffWg==&ch=Tf8wzvQwyBLLJSEmklHpYonwvTEsIb594qsNBCxrtvImBunqSdCVVA==)

* * *
It’s hard to overstate how important January’s Runoff Elections are, Peter.
[If the Democrats win, we could have a President Joe Biden, Vice President Kamala Harris, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi, and Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer.](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X3l0akU69vlcPG9kxPVllSoyXSZrHRjGthuTT8Y9eiKdV-zW5Pg_YwIY3YdMjgU3TTljJVVptsk7IyXCiPzlkQ0NHgRCDqWdEXobTntq2SRNKG_V2xMDhYTt-xob1QSMcns2VeWyOKeoZ1ddI98A2hX3QnvRhftwOur2VSHrXnKNi0pTNqI9pAoW-XFf9a0hPXhZW3o0Yzg1OhWJpTPs9zMZZ5heFQllrS0G4W_gnzGmA&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=an6_p&n=11)
The Democrats Could wield unchecked power for years -- and undo everything we’ve achieved under President Trump’s leadership.
That’s why we keep pleading for every Grassroots Republican to step up and chip in to Keep Georgia Red.

Look -- we won the Senate on Election Day. But under Georgia law, we need to win an absolute majority of votes to secure a victory there. That’s why these Runoff Elections are so critical.
We know what it takes to win, but we also know that we can’t hold off the Democrats without the help of Grassroots Republicans across the nation (like you).
**Can we count on your support in this fight? Great! Make a donation of $5 or more right away.**

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Preparing to pause
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Last week, we announced a series of new restrictions that will go into effect on Monday, November 30, as part of a two-week pause to reduce the strain on our hospitals and healthcare workers. If you missed that announcement, you can watch [this video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pXjJiYcADybnjMUXCmfXSm7d01y9of1tcghZ26uB3B5oDYObdUy2J9IaWHtPZ_0xsUmjTCePSXKzDqhC1IWlTYOdqgv32gqVgObFublnYAnS5vs9X2JkLsG2yo_4WNdklb-RWfX8QNzoq_qQ6h1SwITFFZI6LfZTjlKYntj-VwzqTvVFVHzWLg==&c=CdbkBtiahRHLhE7M7CHMY2TyalcDfBr9FZVkqxdHCwO8bw1QF4Jf9A==&ch=eksC-JN8ObsMMXUIoUH2yx0uF0riMqmp0EADwYhpgCXIN_tqjvssSQ==) for a rundown of the new measures.
In order to set Rhode Island up for success during this pause and prevent the need for a longer or more severe lockdown, it's critical that we all be safe over Thanksgiving - and that means only having dinner with the people you live with. While the new social gathering limit takes effect immediately, the pause will start a week from today - a decision driven primarily by five factors:
1\. Time to prepare. Giving businesses more than a week to prepare will help them handle this pause in a way that works best for themselves and their employees. That means giving them time to figure out shifts and staffing needs, as well as an opportunity to work through their existing inventory to avoid unnecessary food waste.
2\. Measuring the efficacy of these interventions. Because of Thanksgiving, people will be changing from their normal routines this week, spending less time in their offices or in school and more time at home. Including this week in the pause would likely skew the data on the effectiveness of these measures.
3\. Limiting post-Thanksgiving spread. If Rhode Islanders choose to ignore our guidance this week and hold in-person Thanksgiving gatherings with those outside their household, it will lead to increased spread in the next two weeks. Beginning this two-week pause next Monday will help mitigate those impacts.
4\. Avoiding overwhelming our hospitals. We've looked at extensive modeling of different options, and two things became clear. First, we need the pause within the next four weeks if we're going to keep hospitalizations manageable through January. And second, the effect of the pause on our hospitalization rate will be roughly the same no matter when it's implemented during that period. If we all take the pause seriously between November 30 and December 13, we can avoid overwhelming our hospitals.
5\. Providing assistance to our businesses. Businesses throughout our state and across the world have struggled during this crisis. It's our hope that this two-week pause will allow us to avoid a longer and more severe lockdown that would be devastating for businesses. That said, we know this pause isn't easy, and we'll have more announcements this week about financial assistance for impacted businesses.
As with every part of our COVID-19 response, this process will be data-driven. We will be closely tracking behavioral data - traffic data, public mobility data, restaurant reservation data, enforcement data - to ensure that these restrictions have the necessary effect.
It won't be easy, but if we all hold fast during the two-week pause, we can spare our already-exhausted healthcare heroes and save the lives of our fellow Rhode Islanders.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pXjJiYcADybnjMUXCmfXSm7d01y9of1tcghZ26uB3B5oDYObdUy2J4p1cuOAGoA5ED6D1eyytp5FcN0XXIbii00WL8twSEOO_dvZj7MB-AdH107kL0goq_mk6hBaLn5L_9aZYJFyW4aMyxPkLL_sbIYvaPTah7IEZ_o4hsRqcAK8V7xtxMWPGObOa3mHd4pZKpYtV2YvcIVVQrPl4ViZHxTNh-W5oARBYStq_b5gPh6zpqxWqImYz5FFiI_nh4f6Ydfp_8UuMonnjU90LsjPZGC9apvnQJO0yrqA-nTWfaAaTIp08heh0BLKPpuQTNLyNZi_9s2y_dQ=&c=CdbkBtiahRHLhE7M7CHMY2TyalcDfBr9FZVkqxdHCwO8bw1QF4Jf9A==&ch=eksC-JN8ObsMMXUIoUH2yx0uF0riMqmp0EADwYhpgCXIN_tqjvssSQ==).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Help decide which turkey President Trump pardons tomorrow!
body:
President Trump will continue the longstanding White House tradition of pardoning the National Thanksgiving Turkey at a ceremony... | | | |
---
| The White House • November 23, 2020
---
| | |
# **Help decide which turkey President Trump pardons tomorrow!**

**President Trump** will continue the longstanding White House tradition of pardoning the National Thanksgiving Turkey at a ceremony in the Rose Garden tomorrow!

**The turkey who** receives his pardon will become America’s official 2020 National Thanksgiving Turkey. This year’s candidates–Corn and Cob–arrived yesterday at the Willard InterContinental Hotel in Washington, D.C. Tomorrow, the two birds will make their way to the White House to join President Trump for the pardoning ceremony.

**Cast your vote** before 11 a.m. tomorrow to help President Trump decide which turkey to pardon! While the winner will become our National Thanksgiving Turkey, both turkeys will retire to their new home on the campus of Iowa State University.

**✅**[**Click here to vote now!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4cf93c997a&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [**WATCH: Corn and Cob arrive in Washington, D.C.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6df2d9f0ae&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
---
| **Corn and Cob walk the red carpet at The Willard hotel** | November 22, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f820f81538&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=baacc6f94a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=43525283f7)

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: It's CRITICAL we defend Republican David Perdue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Perdue for Senate
clean_body: I'm asking for your help The fate of Georgia is in your hands ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ Peter, I'll cut right to the chase. As of now, Chuck Schumer thinks that he can WIN in Georgia, defeating Republican David Perdue. He's already RAISED millions in order to hijack this seat, which is why I had no choice but to reach out today. In order to DEFEND David Perdue's seat and PROTECT our Republican Senate Majority I need our TOP SUPPORTERS to step up TODAY. If Democrats FLIP David's seat, turning the Senate BLUE in the process, they'll do whatever it takes to PACK the Supreme Court, RAISE your taxes, and IMPLEMENT the Green New Deal. Peter, can I count on you to rush an urgent $150, $50, or $35 contribution to put a stop to this before it's too late? Through MIDNIGHT TONIGHT all gifts made to support Republican David Perdue will have 5X THE IMPACT. EMERGENCY 5X MATCH TO STAND WITH DAVID PERDUE RUSH DONATE HERE A conservative outsider and proven job creator, David Perdue is one of the strongest defenders of our agenda in the Senate, which is why we can't afford to lose him, Peter. Remember, ALL DONATIONS made through midnight tonight will have 5X THE IMPACT in our fight to STAND with David, STOP Chuck Schumer, and PROTECT our Senate Majority. Thank you, Mitch McConnell Paid for by Perdue for Senate

---
| Patriot,
Big Tech had their thumbs on the scale during this election, doing everything they could to suppress conservative voices and elect Joe Biden and the Democrats. They silenced the Hunter Biden email scandal despite ample evidence that it was real. They de-platformed, shadow-banned, and banned conservative voices from their sites.
---
| | | [STAND UP TO BIG TECH](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00158U7Jiai6-rDbYsVVul0EZ6Gtcl7Pb0IXP9tAW__Ql0BvEE2KDZfOX3ia2K-_2ni5ebYoAfCnuZyBnpt87BEXAB36YaY6j7KhFce5UAMCO8xSdx_J-w07saIhYL6eACknUxYuOgi6W6bJaEoMh_oax1c5PQVICRJEPTkzGpGWIWfKIwaTMOgiU0tiQy9lxIz&c=8H3rcIvm4xtJqlwQkVPy7Gly6AW1-vKpewEGoyTVtG_hhIOEILM1ZA==&ch=bUmPomGla24_hU7sMXi-K5PUUkpgFUBYYPl-KCAmyxWmNshtRNVMUw==)
---
| This is clear election interference, and Big Tech is at it once again. In the upcoming Georgia Senate elections, they are trying to help the Democrats using their unmatched power over our country.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00158U7Jiai6-rDbYsVVul0EZ6Gtcl7Pb0IXP9tAW__Ql0BvEE2KDZfOX3ia2K-_2ni5ebYoAfCnuZyBnpt87BEXAB36YaY6j7KhFce5UAMCO8xSdx_J-w07saIhYL6eACknUxYuOgi6W6bJaEoMh_oax1c5PQVICRJEPTkzGpGWIWfKIwaTMOgiU0tiQy9lxIz&c=8H3rcIvm4xtJqlwQkVPy7Gly6AW1-vKpewEGoyTVtG_hhIOEILM1ZA==&ch=bUmPomGla24_hU7sMXi-K5PUUkpgFUBYYPl-KCAmyxWmNshtRNVMUw==)
---
| It's critical that we [KEEP THE SENATE RED](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00158U7Jiai6-rDbYsVVul0EZ6Gtcl7Pb0IXP9tAW__Ql0BvEE2KDZfOX3ia2K-_2ni5ebYoAfCnuZyBnpt87BEXAB36YaY6j7KhFce5UAMCO8xSdx_J-w07saIhYL6eACknUxYuOgi6W6bJaEoMh_oax1c5PQVICRJEPTkzGpGWIWfKIwaTMOgiU0tiQy9lxIz&c=8H3rcIvm4xtJqlwQkVPy7Gly6AW1-vKpewEGoyTVtG_hhIOEILM1ZA==&ch=bUmPomGla24_hU7sMXi-K5PUUkpgFUBYYPl-KCAmyxWmNshtRNVMUw==) and fight back against the "Masters of the Universe" Mark Zuckerberg and Jack Dorsey who are once again interfering in our elections.
I have always fought back against Big Tech, [but I am going to need your help](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00158U7Jiai6-rDbYsVVul0EZ6Gtcl7Pb0IXP9tAW__Ql0BvEE2KDZfOX3ia2K-_2ni5ebYoAfCnuZyBnpt87BEXAB36YaY6j7KhFce5UAMCO8xSdx_J-w07saIhYL6eACknUxYuOgi6W6bJaEoMh_oax1c5PQVICRJEPTkzGpGWIWfKIwaTMOgiU0tiQy9lxIz&c=8H3rcIvm4xtJqlwQkVPy7Gly6AW1-vKpewEGoyTVtG_hhIOEILM1ZA==&ch=bUmPomGla24_hU7sMXi-K5PUUkpgFUBYYPl-KCAmyxWmNshtRNVMUw==). If we let them tip the scales for the Democrats, Republicans will lose the Senate majority. That means we're headed for the Green New Deal, open borders, the erosion of our 2nd Amendment rights, and further COVID-19 lockdowns.
Will you join me in the fight by [chipping in today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00158U7Jiai6-rDbYsVVul0EZ6Gtcl7Pb0IXP9tAW__Ql0BvEE2KDZfOX3ia2K-_2ni5ebYoAfCnuZyBnpt87BEXAB36YaY6j7KhFce5UAMCO8xSdx_J-w07saIhYL6eACknUxYuOgi6W6bJaEoMh_oax1c5PQVICRJEPTkzGpGWIWfKIwaTMOgiU0tiQy9lxIz&c=8H3rcIvm4xtJqlwQkVPy7Gly6AW1-vKpewEGoyTVtG_hhIOEILM1ZA==&ch=bUmPomGla24_hU7sMXi-K5PUUkpgFUBYYPl-KCAmyxWmNshtRNVMUw==)?

name: Christy Smith
subject: re: our new goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

When I decided to run for Congress and lead our fight to take back CA-25, I knew it wouldn't be easy.

I was prepared for the long nights of organizing, the tireless outreach efforts to voters across the district, and even the baseless attacks from my opponent. But honestly, I didn't quite expect the situation we're in now -- with a race still too close to call nearly _three weeks_ after Election Day.

**Here's the deal: We need to raise $225,000 for our recount fund as this count drags on.** We're still weeks away from a potential recount and a conclusion to this race, and our team of lawyers are racking up the billable hours every day. And let me tell you, good lawyers are _expensive_. But it's worth every penny to make sure every person's vote is counted and the will of the people is done.

**[Peter, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help support our recount fund?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d53/3666556059/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMjNfcmVjb3VudDIwcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201123_recount20resend_in")**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d2c/3666556059/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMjNfcmVjb3VudDIwcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201123_recount20resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $22.44](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d2d/3666556059/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMjNfcmVjb3VudDIwcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201123_recount20resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=22.44")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d2e/3666556059/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMjNfcmVjb3VudDIwcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201123_recount20resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d2f/3666556059/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMjNfcmVjb3VudDIwcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201123_recount20resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d28/3666556059/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMjNfcmVjb3VudDIwcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201123_recount20resend_in&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d53/3666556059/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMjNfcmVjb3VudDIwcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201123_recount20resend_in")
This has been a hard-fought race. And it's taken us a long time to get this far. So right now, we have to stay focused on the bigger picture. It's **_crucial_** that every voice in this district is heard and the people's right to choose who represents them is protected.

There's nothing more urgent than the call to protect our democracy. And that's exactly what I intend to do.

I know how committed the people of CA-25 and our team of supporters around the country have been, and I will do everything to make sure your hours of volunteering, your contributions, and your commitment to our campaign and our country are not in vain. The voters _will be heard_.

**[Please rush a donation of $5 to our recount fund so we can fight for every last vote.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d53/3666556059/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMjNfcmVjb3VudDIwcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201123_recount20resend_in")**

Your support means the world to me, as always.

\-- Christy

[](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d53/3666556059/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMjNfcmVjb3VudDIwcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201123_recount20resend_in")
Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors in Ventura and LA county on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this top pick-up House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights. [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d53/3666556059/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDExMjNfcmVjb3VudDIwcmVzZW5kX2luIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2011_email_christysmithrecount?refcode=em20_201123_recount20resend_in")
---

PO Box 301, 24307 Magic Mountain Pkwy, Valencia, CA 91355.

[**Contact us here**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bef8/29776869/833715a/569d4d2b/3666556059/VEsHBg/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/contact"). |

body:

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, NOVEMBER 23, 2020
SENATOR LOEFFLER RECEIVES SECOND CONSECUTIVE NEGATIVE TEST RESULT
ATLANTA - Today, Loeffler campaign spokesperson Stephen Lawson issued the following statement:
"Tonight, Senator Loeffler received her second consecutive negative PCR test result. She continues to feel great, and has no symptoms. She looks forward to getting back out on the campaign trail."

Contributions to Elect Republicans are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes and will be used in connection with federal elections.

Federal law requires Elect Republicans to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.

Contributions from individuals to Elect Republicans of up to $5,000 per year are designated to the Elect Republicans candidate contribution account. Any amount over $5,000 per year is designated to the Elect Republicans Carey account.

The use of the name and likeness of any candidate or officeholder by Elect Republicans is for Elect Republicans’ political communication only. IN NO WAY does it indicate any authorization by, affiliation with, direction from, or endorsement by that person of any kind.

subject: Hirsh Singh comes down strongly on Chris Christie's attack on Trump
body:
"It is Chris Christie who is a national embarrassment... | | |
---

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| | Hirsh Singh comes down strongly on Chris Christie's attack on Trump
---
|
---
| [Jersey Deserves Justice - Contribute Now to Help](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=ffce5928d2&e=3e017fab0f "Jersey Deserves Justice - Contribute Now to Help")
---
| | **Hirsh Singh comes down strongly on Chris Christie's attack on Trump**
Gubernatorial candidate Hirsh Singh, who has vowed to overhaul the election system in New Jersey and make it more transparent, has come down strongly on the attack by former Governor Chris Christie against President Trump over the weekend. Christie wanted Trump to end the lawsuits opposing election fraud and called his legal team a national embarrassment.

"It is Chris Christie who is a national embarrassment," said Singh. "The New Jersey swamp creatures who have been pretending to be pro-America have shown their true colors and have attacked President Trump when he needs our support the most as he takes on the perpetrators of electoral fraud. Christie is angling to run for President in 2024, and in his cynical calculations, it would be better if Trump is completely out of the way and a Democrat administration in power before his run. He couldn't care less that it will be the end of our Republic," added Singh.

Christie as well as his lieutenants have been complicit with those perpetrating this fraud. Christie's right hand man and RNC member, Bill Palatucci, has also attacked Trump for highlighting the fraud committed through mail-in ballots and claimed Trump's opposition to the fraud through mail-in ballots would "undermine our sacred democracy." Another candidate for next year's election, Jack Ciaterelli has called Trump a 'charlatan' while Jon Bramnick, the Republican leader in the state Assembly, has termed Trump's efforts as "dangerous to our democracy."

These are members of the same establishment that had opposed Trump in 2016 and attempted a coup by trying to replace Trump with John Kasich as the GOP nominee for President. "It is ironic that they speak of democracy," pointed out Singh. The centerpiece of Singh's gubernatorial campaign is to fix the electoral system in New Jersey as he himself was the victim of electoral fraud during the 2020 US Senate primary election. Every single type of fraud that Singh experienced has been used against President Trump as well. Singh also has a lawsuit that reached the US Supreme Court in October this year and with arguments nearly identical to those in the lawsuits filed later by President Trump's teams. In both the case of Singh and President Trump, the NJ GOP and their most experienced operatives have been in cahoots with the Democrats in making the fraud a systemic feature of our election system.

The New Jersey establishment had set up a Democrat named Rik Mehta in the 2020 US Senate primary election to oppose Singh and rigged the primary in Mehta's favor. They then joined the Democrats in opposing election transparency despite evidence of massive fraud. As a result of Mehta's Senate candidacy, the Republican Party in New Jersey has nearly been wiped out. Before Christie became Governor, New Jersey had six Republican Congressional seats. After his embarrassing stint as Governor New Jersey, has been reduced to just two Republican Congressional seats; and even those two were due to the momentum provided by President Trump in the districts of Jeff Van Drew and Chris Smith.

Hirsh Singh is determined to drain the New Jersey swamp.

Join the fight to save New Jersey at HirshSingh.com

---
| [Jersey Deserves Justice - Contribute Now to Help](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=4d85611804&e=3e017fab0f "Jersey Deserves Justice - Contribute Now to Help")
---

Thank you,
**The Singh for Governor Press Team**
NEW JERSEY DESERVES JUSTICE

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: ISIS Terrorist Released by Feds in Oregon Town after Grand Jury Indictment
body:
An ISIS terrorist indicted by a federal grand jury for providing material support to the militant Islamist group has been released by federal authorities in Oregon. Even for the famously liberal west coast it may seem unbelievable, especially since a Republican appointee heads the Department of Justice (DOJ), the agency that made the bizarre decision.

[ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21166&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1RcWk1Q3Y0T0ZKZyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjMyMTQ2Mzc=)
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 23, 2020
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21302&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3BhLXZvdGluZy1pcnJlZ3VsYXJpdGllcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTIzMjE0NjM3) | **[The Alleged Voting Irregularities in Pennsylvania](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21302&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3BhLXZvdGluZy1pcnJlZ3VsYXJpdGllcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTIzMjE0NjM3)** Election Day was nearly two weeks ago and there still isn’t an official winner, according to Fitton. Ongoing litigation in states such as Pennsylvania, where the Trump campaign has “....[made] allegations of voter fraud, voter misconduct and maladministration that call into question the results of the Pennsylvania election,” have raised serious concerns about the decision to call the 2020 presidential election for Joe Biden. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21302&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3BhLXZvdGluZy1pcnJlZ3VsYXJpdGllcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTIzMjE0NjM3)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21261&F=H&) | **[ISIS Terrorist Released by Feds in Oregon Town after Grand Jury Indictment](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21261&F=H&)** An ISIS terrorist indicted by a federal grand jury for providing material support to the militant Islamist group has been released by federal authorities in Oregon. Even for the famously liberal west coast it may seem unbelievable, especially since a Republican appointee heads the Department of Justice (DOJ), the agency that made the bizarre decision. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21261&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmx5bm4tdW5tYXNraW5nLXNldmVuLWFnZW5jaWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjMyMTQ2Mzc=) | **[Judicial Watch Sues Seven Federal Agencies for Flynn Unmasking Records](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmx5bm4tdW5tYXNraW5nLXNldmVuLWFnZW5jaWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjMyMTQ2Mzc=)** The names of officials and dates identified in the FOIA requests were taken directly from a list declassified on May 8, 2020, by then-Acting Director of National Intelligence Richard Grenell and submitted to Senators Charles Grassley and Ron Johnson on May 13. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZmx5bm4tdW5tYXNraW5nLXNldmVuLWFnZW5jaWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjMyMTQ2Mzc=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21223&F=H&) | **[Public Colleges Defy Federal Law with Racially Segregated Events to Further Diversity](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21223&F=H&)** The Department of Justice (DOJ) should investigate “an alarming trend of racial segregation” at America’s taxpayer-funded universities, according to a pair of United States Senators who cite a number of troubling examples in a letter to Attorney General William Barr. The incidents appear to be part of a growing and increasingly powerful movement aimed at promoting diversity by somehow undoing what leftists assert is systemic racism at academic institutions in the U.S. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21223&F=H&)
---|---
|

| |
---
### [FARRELL: Potential Biden Buyer’s Remorse ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21263&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZmFycmVsbC1iaWRlbi1sb2NrZG93bi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTIzMjE0NjM3) The Daily Caller It has been hard to pin down exactly what prospective President Biden would do about the pandemic given the chance. Back in August, he said he would “shut the country down” if coronavirus cases resurged. Then in September, Biden backtracked, saying, “There’s going to be no need, in my view, to be able to shut down the whole economy.” Now he has settled on the talking point that he will “follow the science,” which is a non-answer because science can diagnose the problem but cannot determine the details of public policy. Setting and implementing policy requires less following and more leading. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21263&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZmFycmVsbC1iaWRlbi1sb2NrZG93bi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjAxMTIzMjE0NjM3)
---
### [Judicial Watch President’s New Book Criticizes Corruption on the Left ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21262&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvbmV3LWJvb2stbGVmdC1jb3JydXB0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjMyMTQ2Mzc=) The Washington Times Tom Fitton is Washington’s premier open secrets warrior, forcing Democrat- and Republican-led agencies to relinquish hidden data, such as an incredibly high number of “extra voters” nationwide.

“Extra” meaning counties that have more people on their rosters than eligible adult voters. Pennsylvania carries more than 800,000 inactive registrations. Both are recipes for fraud, he argues. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21262&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvbmV3LWJvb2stbGVmdC1jb3JydXB0aW9uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjMyMTQ2Mzc=)
---
### [Fitton: 2020 Election Update ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21303&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZml0dG9uLTIwMjAtZWxlY3Rpb24tdXBkYXRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjMyMTQ2Mzc=) Breitbart I take no comfort in saying that we saw this coming. Back in June, for example, I told Lou Dobbs, “It’s been a state by state battle to protect the integrity of our elections. There will be a severe temptation to cheat, and now that’s going to be a lot easier to do because our system is going to be overwhelmed with ballots and applications for ballots.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52102&L=21303&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZml0dG9uLTIwMjAtZWxlY3Rpb24tdXBkYXRlLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMjMyMTQ2Mzc=)
---

clean_body: An ISIS terrorist indicted by a federal grand jury for providing material support to the militant Islamist group has been released by federal authorities in Oregon. Even for the famously liberal west coast it may seem unbelievable, especially since a Republican appointee heads the Department of Justice (DOJ), the agency that made the bizarre decision. = | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 23, 2020 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Election Day was nearly two weeks ago and there still isn’t an official winner, according to Fitton. Ongoing litigation in states such as Pennsylvania, where the Trump campaign has “....[made] allegations of voter fraud, voter misconduct and maladministration that call into question the results of the Pennsylvania election,” have raised serious concerns about the decision to call the 2020 presidential election for Joe Biden. ---|--- | | | | = | = An ISIS terrorist indicted by a federal grand jury for providing material support to the militant Islamist group has been released by federal authorities in Oregon. Even for the famously liberal west coast it may seem unbelievable, especially since a Republican appointee heads the Department of Justice (DOJ), the agency that made the bizarre decision. = ---|--- | | | | = | = The names of officials and dates identified in the FOIA requests were taken directly from a list declassified on May 8, 2020, by then-Acting Director of National Intelligence Richard Grenell and submitted to Senators Charles Grassley and Ron Johnson on May 13. = ---|--- | | | | == | == The Department of Justice (DOJ) should investigate “an alarming trend of racial segregation” at America’s taxpayer-funded universities, according to a pair of United States Senators who cite a number of troubling examples in a letter to Attorney General William Barr. The incidents appear to be part of a growing and increasingly powerful movement aimed at promoting diversity by somehow undoing what leftists assert is systemic racism at academic institutions in the U.S. == ---|--- | | | The Daily Caller It has been hard to pin down exactly what prospective President Biden would do about the pandemic given the chance. Back in August, he said he would “shut the country down” if coronavirus cases resurged. Then in September, Biden backtracked, saying, “There’s going to be no need, in my view, to be able to shut down the whole economy.” Now he has settled on the talking point that he will “follow the science,” which is a non-answer because science can diagnose the problem but cannot determine the details of public policy. Setting and implementing policy requires less following and more leading. = The Washington Times Tom Fitton is Washington’s premier open secrets warrior, forcing Democrat- and Republican-led agencies to relinquish hidden data, such as an incredibly high number of “extra voters” nationwide. “Extra” meaning counties that have more people on their rosters than eligible adult voters. Pennsylvania carries more than 800,000 inactive registrations. Both are recipes for fraud, he argues. = = Breitbart I take no comfort in saying that we saw this coming. Back in June, for example, I told Lou Dobbs, “It’s been a state by state battle to protect the integrity of our elections. There will be a severe temptation to cheat, and now that’s going to be a lot easier to do because our system is going to be overwhelmed with ballots and applications for ballots.” = | CLIPS = TWEETS | | | | | == ---|---|--- Are @sendavidperdue @KLoeffler and other Senators prepared to object to Electoral College electors from states where the elections are suspect? 8:58 PM · Nov 22, 2020 | | | | | = ---|---|--- If Biden wins, he proposes Jake Sullivan, who is implicated in Hillary Clinton national security email crimes, for National Security Adviser. #Benghazi 1:58 PM · Nov 23, 2020 | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2020, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Chris Ekstrom
subject: The Devil Went Down to Georgia
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w

Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom. I am a conservative, America First businessman, donor, and former Congressional candidate who has fought for the President's America First agenda - and right now, that agenda needs our help, every one of us

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w
!

In my experience as a businessman, success doesn't happen if you don't show up and compete. You & I must fight to Make America Great Again!

At this present time, every donation is considered a weapon in our arsenal to preserve our America First Agenda.

You have to FIGHT for God and Country - for what you believe - and right now is OUR time to fight!

I am helping Drain the DC Swamp PAC to fight the radical Left in Georgia - so we can win TWO crucial Senate seats and stop Pelosi's and Schumer's radical agenda!

Our ads are in final production as we speak and depending on how much we raise in the next 3 days will determine how many ads we buy.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w

We see now how frerocious the media and the Left are against President Trump and his agenda he has worked so hard to implement. They will stop at nothing to steal the election from him, and they will stop at nothing to steal the two U.S. Senate elections in Georgia!

Pelosi may be weakened, but she still has control over the House.

If the President's legal team can't expose the truth behind his election, then the Senate will be the only check on Joe Biden and his puppet-master Kamala Harris - and we need to make sure we take BOTH Georgia seats to give Mitch McConnell the ability to stop the squad's agenda! The socialist squad is bigger now - they are no longer just four people!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w

You have to understand -

You must understand, that senile old Nancy Pelosi has no control over her Democrat caucus. AOC and the squad do!

Imagine what AOC will do with total power in DC to play with!

-Job-killing Green New Deal.

-Making working people pay for the rich to take "gender studies" college classes!

-Defunding the police so AOC's rioter friends can't be stopped!

-Instituting Socialism as a federal mandate!

This is no joke - the AOC agenda will be federal policy if we don't win these Georgia races! We need a Senate firewall - it is so important.

Soros, Hollywood, Bloomberg, and other far-left crazies are dumping millions into this election. That means we must meet his challenge.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w

>From FOX News:

A group bankrolled by liberal billionaires George Soros and Michael Bloomberg is pouring $300,000 into Georgia to back Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in the runoff elections.

The Black PAC, which works to push black voters to the polls, on Tuesday reported spending $300,000 on canvassing for the two Democratic candidates. This is the first significant expense from an outside liberal group in the pivotal Georgia runoffs that will determine which party controls Congress's upper chamber next year. The elections are expected to garner tens of millions in outside spending from Democratic and Republican groups.

The Black PAC is heavily financed by left-wing billionaires, dark money, and the Chuck Schumer-tied Senate Majority PAC. It received $1.5 million from the Democracy PAC, a super PAC created by Soros, and $6.32 million from Bloomberg. The Sixteen Thirty Fund, which has been used as an avenue to push $55 million in secret cash into the 2020 elections, gave $2.25 million, while the Senate Majority PAC added $1 million. Other liberal groups, such as America Votes, Unite the Country, and various union PACs, have added millions more.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w

Drain the DC Swamp PAC has helped good America-First conservatives like you and me for years, providing vital cover when Soros and Bloomberg start trying to bury conservatives with their billions.

The Devil is coming down to Georgia! We need to win TWO Senate races there to fend him off. Can you help?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w

AOC will have a field day if we lose these races- she is the bane of our Republic and we MUST stop her!

We want to protect your Constitutionally protected rights, but we can't do that if Chuck Schumer gets control over the Senate!

We MUST win two of two races there. The stakes couldn't be higher. Will you help us?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w

Your contribution is so crucial. Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will send an immediate message to the Left

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w
- that neither Georgia, NOR America is theirs!

The President is fighting. Our two Republican Senators are fighting. You and I must fight as well! Help us push forward and win in Georgia

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w
, for America!

Respectfully,

Image

secure.anedot.com/draintheswamp/st1

Christopher Ekstrom

Businessman

America First Donor

P.S. Socialists control the House of Representatives and God only knows what they will do. The ONLY firewall we have against all of that is the United States Senate - and that could change if we lose on January 5th in Georgia. Donate right now to help us save the Senate.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=7RSOW&m=gLqbFoI10rcqI4c&b=4hoBPnn0h3mJ8L1muTOz7w
We must elect Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

To unsubscribe or change subscriber options, visit:
https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rByszEzMnLTsbKysjMxsHLRGtCwcjCycrCwc

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Volunteer Opportunity from Your Home
body:
| | Georgia and The Nation Needs Your Help
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2wbizW1YH0rx8-mnBumIhyVfANndAD5BWAb1fP7nHXuKvwhR9W3FouMskB1tLxzLf4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=1)
| Peter, We are looking for Christians from across the nation who desire to make a difference in the upcoming U.S. Senate runoff elections in Georgia on January 5. You can make a difference by participating in our postcard writing campaign to reach Christians in Georgia and encourage them to vote. These elections will determine who controls the Senate, and therefore, which political party platform holds the future of America. **Our goal is to send half a million hand-written postcards to Christians in Georgia to get out and vote.** Hand-written postcards have proven to be one of the most effective tools in motivating Christians to vote. We need you to be part of this powerful opportunity to make a difference. Your participation only requires your time - there is no financial commitment on your part, unless you desire to [donate](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201110apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=2). We will provide you with everything you need, including postcards, stamps, a list of names, along with complete instructions. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2wbizW1YH0rx8-mnBumIhyVfANndAD5BWAb1fP7nHXuKvwhR9W3FouMskB1tLxzLf4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=3) You can write postcards individually, together with your family, Bible study, or small group. Please consider consulting with your pastor about making this a church event as well. If there were ever a time for Christians to STAND for Biblical values, it is right now in America. The Georgia Senate runoff elections will impact our churches' freedom to remain open, protection for the unborn, stopping the spread of socialism, the preservation of the family as God designed it, the protection of Israel, and much more. Your participation is urgent if we are to reach our goal of 500,000 handwritten postcards. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2wbizW1YH0rx8-mnBumIhyVfANndAD5BWAb1fP7nHXuKvwhR9W3FouMskB1tLxzLf4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=4) We also have other volunteer opportunities for people who want to be on the ground in Georgia door-knocking or making phone calls. [Please sign up](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2wbizW1YH0rx8-mnBumIhyVfANndAD5BWAb1fP7nHXuKvwhR9W3FouMskB1tLxzLf4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=5) to let us know today if you will partner with us and unite with us in prayer for the future of America and the church. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=6)
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=7)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_lnjJXuwm9W1LbYtLdGxMjm5tk5gSII0q4CUWEUH1EM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=10) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=ShFaE4UMkbUbrBGAfRo6cWtpYpG_86vVborl4qh6VMvTodsDIy60QzMHxkiHaL0UXpB3C5GFDWiEmkpisLd3BpmWcMBxsv4tZZBXg91jBhs&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=11) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201123com01&n=12)
